SEARCH
Package net.elena.murat.gui

Class ModernComponentFactory

java.lang.Object
net.elena.murat.gui.ModernComponentFactory
public class ModernComponentFactory extends Object
A factory class for creating modern, visually appealing Swing components. This class provides static methods to create styled UI components with consistent color schemes, fonts, and visual effects.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    ModernComponentFactory.LabelType
    Enumeration of label types for consistent styling.

  • Constructor Details

    • ModernComponentFactory

      public ModernComponentFactory()

  • Method Details

    • createTextField

      public static JTextField createTextField(String initialText, int columns)
      Creates a modern styled text field with placeholder support. The field has rounded corners, focus highlighting, and clean typography.
      Parameters:
      initialText - the placeholder text to show when field is empty
      columns - the number of columns for the text field width
      Returns:
      a styled JTextField component

    • createTextField

      public static JTextField createTextField(String placeholder)
      Creates a modern styled text field with default width.
      Parameters:
      placeholder - the placeholder text to show when field is empty
      Returns:
      a styled JTextField component with 20 columns

    • createButton

      public static JButton createButton(String text, Color backgroundColor)
      Creates a modern styled button with hover effect. Button foreground turns green on mouse hover.
      Parameters:
      text - the button text
      backgroundColor - the primary background color for the button
      Returns:
      a styled JButton component with hover effect

    • createPrimaryButton

      public static JButton createPrimaryButton(String text)
      Creates a primary action button with the default primary color.
      Parameters:
      text - the button text
      Returns:
      a primary styled JButton component

    • createSuccessButton

      public static JButton createSuccessButton(String text)
      Creates a success button for positive actions like save or confirm.
      Parameters:
      text - the button text
      Returns:
      a success styled JButton component

    • createWarningButton

      public static JButton createWarningButton(String text)
      Creates a warning button for cautionary actions.
      Parameters:
      text - the button text
      Returns:
      a warning styled JButton component

    • createErrorButton

      public static JButton createErrorButton(String text)
      Creates an error button for destructive actions like delete or cancel.
      Parameters:
      text - the button text
      Returns:
      an error styled JButton component

    • createTabbedPane

      public static JTabbedPane createTabbedPane()
      Creates a modern styled tabbed pane with consistent styling.
      Returns:
      a styled JTabbedPane component

    • createLabel

      public static JLabel createLabel(String text, ModernComponentFactory.LabelType type)
      Creates a modern styled label with consistent typography.
      Parameters:
      text - the label text
      type - the label type (heading, body, or label)
      Returns:
      a styled JLabel component

    • createHeadingLabel

      public static JLabel createHeadingLabel(String text)
      Creates a heading label with larger, bold text.
      Parameters:
      text - the heading text
      Returns:
      a heading styled JLabel component

      Creates a body label for regular text content.
      Parameters:
      text - the body text
      Returns:
      a body styled JLabel component

      Creates a form label for field descriptions.
      Parameters:
      text - the label text
      Returns:
      a form label styled JLabel component

    • createMonospaceLabel

      public static JLabel createMonospaceLabel(String text)
      Creates a monospace label for code or technical content.
      Parameters:
      text - the label text
      Returns:
      a monospace styled JLabel component

    • createCardPanel

      public static JPanel createCardPanel()
      Creates a card panel with subtle shadow and rounded corners. Suitable for grouping related content with visual separation.
      Returns:
      a styled JPanel with card appearance

    • createFormPanel

      public static JPanel createFormPanel()
      Creates a form panel with consistent spacing for form elements.
      Returns:
      a styled JPanel optimized for form layout

    • createScrolledTextArea

      public static JScrollPane createScrolledTextArea(int rows, int columns)
      Creates a modern styled text area with scroll support.
      Parameters:
      rows - the number of rows to display
      columns - the number of columns to display
      Returns:
      a styled JTextArea inside a JScrollPane

    • createTextArea

      public static JTextArea createTextArea(int rows, int columns)
      Creates a modern styled text area.
      Parameters:
      rows - the number of rows to display
      columns - the number of columns to display
      Returns:
      a styled JTextArea component

    • createCheckbox

      public static JCheckBox createCheckbox(String text)
      Creates a modern styled checkbox with custom colors.
      Parameters:
      text - the checkbox label text
      Returns:
      a styled JCheckBox component

    • createComboBox

      public static <T> JComboBox<T> createComboBox(T[] items)
      Creates a modern styled combo box.
      Parameters:
      items - the items to display in the combo box
      Returns:
      a styled JComboBox component

    • setMargin

      public static void setMargin(JComponent component, int top, int left, int bottom, int right)
      Applies a consistent margin to a component.
      Parameters:
      component - the component to add margin to
      top - top margin in pixels
      left - left margin in pixels
      bottom - bottom margin in pixels
      right - right margin in pixels

    • createSeparator

      public static JSeparator createSeparator()
      Creates a separator with consistent styling.
      Returns:
      a styled JSeparator component

      Creates a horizontal separator with consistent styling.
      Returns:
      a styled JSeparator component

      public static JSeparator createVerticalSeparator()
      Creates a vertical separator with consistent styling.
      Returns:
      a styled JSeparator component

      Sets up a GridBagConstraints object with consistent defaults.
      Returns:
      a configured GridBagConstraints object

      Sets up a GridBagConstraints object with vertical fill.
